nodes.label: Quick start with Docker Compose (MongoDB + MinIO)
nodes.norm_label: quick start with docker compose (mongodb + minio)

nodes.label: ContentPlugin
nodes.rationale: One contract handles content-type-specific behavior so adding a new media type requires a matching client/server plugin pair and no core code changes.

nodes.label: Object storage
nodes.rationale: Binaries flow directly between device and object storage via short-lived presigned URLs, avoiding server-side byte transfer.

nodes.label: Offline-first sync
nodes.rationale: The server is for sync, not playback; files land under /sdcard/Hikari mirroring server storage so other apps can consume them offline.

nodes.label: graphify query
nodes.rationale: Use graphify query first for repo architecture, structure, component, or code modification questions when graphify-out/graph.json exists.

nodes.label: Direct-to-storage transfers
nodes.rationale: The app talks REST + JWT to the server while bytes flow straight to and from S3/R2/MinIO through short-lived presigned URLs.

nodes.label: Default Android Studio Launcher Branding
nodes.rationale: Both launcher icons are the unmodified Android Studio template artwork: the green Android robot (bugdroid) silhouette on a light-green grid background with a drop shadow. They are shipped at five density buckets (mdpi, hdpi, xhdpi, xxhdpi, xxxhdpi) for square/adaptive and round shapes. This indicates the Android client has not yet been given custom app branding/iconography.

links.source_location: same artwork, round vs square mask
